import { Subject } from '../Subject'; import { Scheduler } from '../Scheduler'; import { TestMessage } from './TestMessage'; import { SubscriptionLog } from './SubscriptionLog'; import { SubscriptionLoggable } from './SubscriptionLoggable'; export declare class HotObservable<T> extends Subject<T> implements SubscriptionLoggable { messages: TestMessage[]; subscriptions: SubscriptionLog[]; scheduler: Scheduler; logSubscribedFrame: () => number; logUnsubscribedFrame: (index: number) => void; constructor(messages: TestMessage[], scheduler: Scheduler); setup(): void; } //# sourceMappingURL=HotObservable.d.ts.map
